title: No Container Labels
description: Removes container labels from most of the interactable blocks and entities for a cleaner look.
body:
# No Container Labels

This mod removes the container labels from most of the interactable blocks and entities, excluding the modded ones. It also removes the `Trades` text from the villager GUIs. But you may ask why would anyone even need this? This mod exists because I was so annoyed by how other languages except EN_US displayed duplicate texts on the containers when using resourcepacks like [GUI Revision](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision) which adds the container names to the pixel art of the container. --- ### Left side is vanilla, right is with NCL --- ### Credits: Mod Logo by [Vixel](https://modrinth.com/user/Vixel)
